title: Growth Experiment
description:
Welcome to "The Curious Mind's Expedition", a brand new podcast where host Alex Arias shares his thoughts, experiences, and insights on a range of topics. Join Alex as he embarks on his journey to achieve his New Year's resolution of consistently journaling for 365 days in a row, this time in the form of a podcast.

In today's episode, 

• Alex will dive into the world of SEO experiments, sharing his findings and tips for optimizing your podcast for search engines. 
• He'll also share his secret to maintaining friendships - a social hack that he has honed over time to keep his relationships strong and healthy.
• But that's not all! Alex has also got some exciting news to share about his upcoming trip to Europe. He'll provide updates on his travel plans, share his itinerary, and give listeners a glimpse into the adventures that lie ahead.
Whether you're a seasoned traveler, a digital marketer, or simply someone looking for a new source of inspiration, this podcast is sure to have something for everyone. So, sit back, relax, and get ready to have your mind blown with "The Curious Mind's Expedition".

As Alex mentions, he has nothing to sell you but he does want to provide a way for listeners to get to know him better. For those who are interested, you can find more information about Alex on his website. Simply follow the link provided below to learn more about the host of this fascinating podcast.

https://thealexarias.com/ (NO LONGER A VALID URL)

So, what are you waiting for? Subscribe to "The Curious Mind's Expedition" now and join Alex on his journey to gain mental clarity and document his life for future generations. With each episode, you'll learn something new, be inspired, and feel a little bit closer to the host. So don't miss out, tune in today!

I'd like to thank Chat GPT for this beautiful 2000-character-long description. Took about 1 minute of effort on my end.

title: What am I doing?
description: In this episode, I dive into the person I am today and what I do with my time. Current fitness journey, schedule, college, starting all this self-branding, and a podcast recommendation that I am using as a tool/ blueprint for self-branding. Also, I added some music at the end, like I said I would last pod! It took an embarrassing amount of time to figure it out, but it's done. I now have to build a system where it takes no time to add it.

title: Got a long way to go
description: In this episode I talk about what demographic I think can get the most out of listening to the pod, realistic goal timelines, the complications I am running into as I start branding myself, and ideas I'd like to implement to spruce up the pod.

title: I'm Learning
description:
Episode description: what is the audience dedicating their time and attention to listen to? This question is what I  have decided to answer every time I write a description for this pod now (hence the title). 

In this ep I address the strangers stumbling upon the pod, I state a failure of mine, I talk briefly about something embracing about myself, and I give some pretty solid value.

title: The start
description:
I ain't good at making descriptions yet. So this is what we get... me proclaiming I'm not good at descriptions.
P.S. Apologies for the squeaky chair audio in the background that's something to work on.

title: My return from the Navy: With Cesar
description: Alex and Cesar meet up for a podcast years later.

title: I leave to the Navy: With Cesar
description: Cesar and Alex sit down one last time to chat before Alex ships off to the Navy.

title: Second conversation: With Cesar (Part 2)
description: Cesar sits down to talk with Alex about their 2020 experience.

title: Second conversation: With Cesar (Part 1)
description: Cesar sits down to talk with Alex about their 2020 experience.

title: First conversation: With Cesar
description: Cesar has a conversation with his partner in crime for 2020, Alex. They talk about the adventure they embarked on January 2020 called "The F*ck You Money Months". The Journey Begins!

title: A Brief Explanation
description: I explain what this podcast is all about
